text:
There was once a girl named Marisa who loved butterflies. She lived in a small town and spent hours collecting them. Each spring she would go on an expedition.

Every morning she’d start late. She’d collect breakfast eggs first.

After breakfast, she’d race through town.

She’d find a patch of flowers almost anywhere.

Then she’d collect a handful.

Back at her nest she’d spread them out.

One day she found a giant silkmoth.

It was huge!

She wrapped wings around her head.

It flew her around!

Their courtship amused everyone.

So Marisa got an owl house, full feathers.

Then she learned about hibernation.

So she'd sleep a month

And go collecting in spring.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
